creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 227015
games/brogue: Update to 1.10.1

A patch release.  Changes:

 * Fixed an out-of-sync error when loading a game with a 64-bit seed.
 * (For distributors) Added an experimental --data-dir option for
   specifying the location of game resources.

https://github.com/tmewett/BrogueCE/releases/tag/v1.10.1

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 amd64 i386 FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE.
